# Payload Crowdin Sync — LLM entrypoint
#
# This file is intended for tools/agents that ingest documentation repositories.
# It points to the highest-signal pages in this docs site.

## What is this?
`payload-crowdin-sync` is a Payload CMS plugin that syncs localized fields to Crowdin and loads translations back into Payload.

## Canonical docs
- /docs/intro
- /docs/plugin

## Plugin reference
- /docs/plugin/README
- /docs/plugin/crowdin
- /docs/plugin/serializer

## Engineering / repo notes
- /docs/repo/README
- /docs/repo/engineering

## External references
- https://www.npmjs.com/package/payload-crowdin-sync
- https://thompsonsj.github.io/slate-serializers-demo/
